name: Mutual NDA
description: Standard mutual non-disclosure agreement allowing each party to share confidential information for a defined purpose

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page for executing the Mutual NDA, capturing party details and specific business terms

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) for SaaS and cloud service providers, covering access, support, fees, data, and liability

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard Design Partner Agreement for early-stage product partnerships involving feedback, testing, and co-development

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Service Level Agreement (SLA) template defining uptime commitments and remedies, for use as an addendum to the CSA

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA) covering GDPR and data privacy obligations between controllers and processors

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) for consulting, implementation, and services engagements

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard AI Addendum for incorporating AI-specific terms such as data use restrictions and model training limitations into existing agreements

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard Pilot Agreement governing product evaluation and trial periods before full commercial commitment

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard Partnership Agreement for formalising business partnerships, referral arrangements, and collaborations

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) for HIPAA compliance when handling protected health information

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard Software License Agreement covering licensing terms, restrictions, and warranties for software products
